easy.title: Easy: Key Value Pairs Basics
easy.problem: Write a simple program demonstrating Key Value Pairs.
easy.starterCode: # Python implementation for Key Value Pairs
easy.solution:
# Python implementation for Key Value Pairs
def process_data(records):
    """Process input dataset cleanly."""
    results = [item.strip().upper() for item in records if item]
    return results

if __name__ == '__main__':
    data = ['apple', 'banana', 'cherry']
    print('Processed:', process_data(data))
